Cost Guide

Clothing Manufacturing Costs: The Complete 2026 Breakdown for Brand Owners

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 14 min read
Home / Blog / Clothing Manufacturing Costs: The Complete 2026 Breakdown for Brand Owners

Understanding clothing manufacturing costs is essential for pricing your products, calculating margins, and choosing the right manufacturing partner. In this 2026 guide, we break down every cost component with real numbers from our Sialkot factory — and show you why Pakistan offers the best value for custom clothing manufacturing.

The Four Cost Components Every Brand Owner Must Understand

Clothing manufacturing costs break down into four categories:

  1. Fabric (40-60% of total): The biggest variable — depends on type, weight, and quality
  2. CMT — Cut, Make, Trim (20-30%): Labor for cutting, sewing, and finishing
  3. Overhead and Sampling (10-15%): Pattern making, sample development, QC
  4. Logistics (10-20%): Shipping, duties, and brokerage — the hidden costs most brands underestimate

Fabric Cost — The Biggest Variable

Fabric represents the largest portion of manufacturing cost. GSM (grams per square meter) directly affects price:

  • 220 GSM tee fabric: $1.50-2.00 per meter
  • 380 GSM fleece: $4.00-6.00 per meter
  • Thread, trims, zippers, labels: Add $0.50-2.00 per garment

FABRIOZA sources fabric locally in Sialkot — no markup through agents or trading companies.

Cut, Make, and Trim (CMT) — Labor Costs

CMT covers cutting fabric, sewing garments, and applying trims. Pakistan's skilled workforce offers competitive CMT rates compared to USA manufacturing (10x higher) and even China. ISO 9001 certification means additional QC steps are built into the process, ensuring consistency.

Sampling Costs — What to Expect

Sample development typically costs $50-150 depending on complexity. At FABRIOZA, sample costs are credited against your first bulk order — so if you proceed with production, sampling is effectively free.

Real Cost Examples by Garment Type (FABRIOZA Pricing)

GarmentGSM/Spec50 pcs200 pcs500 pcs
Basic T-shirt180 GSM cotton$8-12$7-10$6-9
Premium Hoodie340 GSM French terry$18-25$15-22$14-20
Tracksuit set300 GSM$22-30$18-26$16-24
Gym setPoly-spandex$16-22$14-19$12-17
Sublimation jersey150 GSM polyester$12-18$10-15$9-14

Note: These are estimates. Use our MOQ Calculator for detailed pricing or request a precise quote.

Shipping and Import Costs — The Hidden Budget Killers

Most brands underestimate logistics costs:

  • Sea freight from Pakistan to USA: $0.80-1.50 per unit
  • Air freight: $3-8 per unit
  • Import duty: 12-32% depending on garment and destination

DDP shipping with FABRIOZA covers all of this in one price — no surprise fees.

Why Pakistan Is 15-30% Cheaper Than China on Landed Cost

Compare a 100-unit hoodie order:

  • China FOB: $12/unit + $350 shipping + $144 duty + $100 brokerage = $1,794
  • Pakistan DDP (FABRIOZA): $14/unit all-inclusive = $1,400

Pakistan saves 22% on true landed cost.

How to Calculate Your Retail Price

  • Manufacturing + Shipping + Duty = Cost of Goods (COG)
  • COG × 2.2-2.5 = Wholesale price
  • COG × 4-5 = Direct-to-consumer retail

Example: $16 hoodie + $4 shipping/duty = $20 COG. Wholesale: $44-50. DTC: $80-100.

How to Reduce Manufacturing Costs Over Time

  • Scale quantities (price breaks at 200, 500, 1000+ units)
  • Build long-term relationships (loyalty pricing)
  • Standardize fabrics across your collection
  • Reduce revision rounds with better initial briefs

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a realistic budget for my first production run?

$1,500-3,000 for 50 pieces including samples, production, and shipping. Use our MOQ Calculator for exact estimates.

Why does unit price decrease with larger quantities?

Setup costs (pattern making, machine calibration) are spread across more units. Fabric is purchased at better rates. Production runs more efficiently.

Are there hidden costs I should know about?

Import duties, brokerage fees, and currency exchange fluctuations. DDP shipping eliminates these surprises.

How much cheaper is Pakistan than USA domestic?

Typically 60-70% cheaper on manufacturing costs. A hoodie costing $45-60 in the USA costs $12-20 in Pakistan.

Does FABRIOZA offer DDP pricing?

Yes, DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) is available to most countries. One price covers everything.
